comment.body: Alma, do you put in any weight into tomorrow being 9/11?  It's been very consistently good, green days the last few years.  And I don't think there has been a lower close vs the previous day for many years. I had one of my biggest days last on 9/11 due to the massive reversal mid morning. I think it was one of the largest reversals we had seen all year. Any thoughts on this in conjunction with the CPI/options positioning?

comment.body: TRUMP ON NATO DRONE INCIDENT: “HERE WE GO!”After NATO jets shot down Russian drones over Poland, Trump reacted with a brief post: “What’s with Russia violating Poland’s airspace with drones? Here we go!”European leaders called it a dangerous escalation, the first direct NATO engagement with Russian hardware. Officials say Trump’s vague response rattled allies, stressing U.S. leadership is key.
